channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Balogun's Red Card Suspension Lifted After Trump Called FIFA Chief, Sources Say
item.description: Balogun's reinstatement followed a call from President Trump to FIFA President Gianni Infantino last week, inquiring about the organization's review.

item.title: Russian attack on Kyiv kills at least 12 on eve of NATO summit
item.description: All Russian ballistic missiles hit their targets, highlighting Ukraine's urgent need for more U.S. Patriot interceptor systems, officials said.

item.title: Fourth of July fireworks illuminate skies nationwide
item.description: Americans across the country marked the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence with the beloved tradition of fireworks displays.

item.title: 12-hour funeral procession for slain leader moves through Tehran streets
item.description: An estimated 15 to 20 million people, along with foreign dignitaries and religious leaders, were expected to participate in the ceremonies.
